sections.text: The Fool is usually depicted as a beggar or a vagabond, he wears ragged clothes & stockings without shoes, and carries a stick on his back. Ruling planet:UranusPisces going to Aries, on the other hand Uranus/Mercury standing for curiosity, spontaneity, madnessElement:AirNumber:0 as nothing and begin of it all Card Page Always trust your instincts
Changes, movement, the innocence of a child
The positive break up of structures and limitations, selfless idealism, endless fantasy, optimism, trust to instincts
The negative loss of structures, useless daydreaming, infantility
Openness, trust, risk-taking, loyalty to ourselves, freedom, independence, creativity, performance, leapfrogging, follow-up of the heart.
You are ready for a new start, perhaps for a quality change. Let yourself go, take a break even if fear tries to hold you back again and again. Trust the voice of your heart.
What do you have to do to get rid of it? What is the role of the “tiger of fear” in your life? How do you imagine the bold jump into something new? Where’s your heart calling?
If the answers are not clear to you, draw another cards.
Now I’m following my heart’s suggestions. I’m open and I’m going wherever you may lead me.
I tread the path of life with joy in my heart and a smile on my lips.
